passage: The post office works hard to deliver packages on time. When a package is late, customers are not happy. To avoid this, workers check each route carefully every morning before they start.

questions.q: What does the post office try to do?
Why do workers check the route every morning?

text: Recycling paper and bottles helps ___ waste and protect the environment.
note: 句意:回收能「減少」廢棄物,選 reduce。

text: Hurry up, ___ we will miss the train.
note: 前後是「快點,否則…」的關係,選 otherwise。
